decision.why: The selected-tile rocWMMA producer is already 21.456 ms score-only at S4096, before contribution sink, dKV, or dQ. It solves the no-HBM-score-page contract but loses the fast query-major q/dO reuse that made the Triton materialized producer viable.

kernel_contract.boundary: q, grad_output, output, lse, compressed/shared kv, LI route -> dQ and compressed dKV

core_formulas.scaled_dp: scaled_dP[t,h,k] = p[t,h,k] * (dot(dO[t,h,:], v[g(t,k),:]) - dot(dO[t,h,:], O[t,h,:])) * scale
core_formulas.dkv: dKV[g,d] += sum_{t,h,k:g(t,k)=g} scaled_dP[t,h,k] * q[t,h,d] + p[t,h,k] * dO[t,h,d]

preferred_order: Composable Kernel block-attention style tile loop if route-gathered sparse K/V and custom dQ/dKV epilogue can be expressed
raw HIP persistent producer-consumer kernel using MFMA/rocWMMA fragments
TileLang only if it can express a persistent grouped accumulator without active-row HBM materialization
implementation_surface.why_not_mori_shared_memory: MORI/SHMEM can support inter-rank EP buffers, but it cannot make one kernel CTA's LDS score page visible to sibling CTAs. The score tile must be consumed in the same workgroup or by a persistent cooperative launch.

proposed_owner_grid.token_tile: start at 1 or 2 tokens per cooperative group to preserve Q/dO residency; do not jump to group-major ownership
proposed_owner_grid.d_consumers: multiple D16/D32 MFMA consumers consume the immediately produced score/prob/scaled-dP page before HBM
proposed_owner_grid.dq_strategy: CTA-local dQ accumulator or bounded compact dQ partials; avoid selected-tile scalar atomics as production path
proposed_owner_grid.dkv_strategy: after producer beats the gate, add route-aware segmented/grouped dKV epilogue before global atomics or compact partial writes

promotion_gates.reason: Must beat or match the materialized query-major producer band while eliminating materialized P/grad-logit inputs.
Must beat the current full sparse-attention backward kernel boundary before TorchTitan e2e materialization.
The final candidate must return the same sparse-attention backward outputs, not only a faster dKV diagnostic slice.

next_commands.remote_first_gate: Add a query-major source-boundary HIP/CK producer-only checksum mode, then run S4096 layer-2 timing on do-sonle-kernel before adding dKV epilogue.
